nasb.text: But now bring me a minstrel.” And it came about, when the minstrel played, that the hand of the Lord came upon him.

esv.text: But now bring me a musician.” And when the musician played, the hand of the Lord came upon him.

cnv.text: 現在，給我找一個琴師來。”當琴師彈琴的時候，耶和華的能力就臨到他身上。

ccb.text: 现在你们给我找一个琴师来。”琴师弹琴的时候，耶和华的灵降在以利沙身上，
